use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION AND TREATMENT OF HEART FAILURE

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
ATACAND is indicated for the treatment of hypertension
in adults and children 1 to < 17 years of age. It may be
used alone or in combination with other antihypertensive
agents.
